fact_nuggets.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When Snowscape is used, a snowstorm will begin on the field. This effect will last for 5 turns. This clears any other type of weather , but will fail if there is already a snowstorm. However, it cannot override weather that occurs in the overworld. All Ice-type Pokemon have their Defense raised by 50% for the duration of the snowstorm. Pokemon with the Ice Body Ability recover 116 of their maximum HP each round. Pokemon with the Snow Cloak Ability increase their evasiveness by 20%. Pokemon with the Slush Rush Ability have their Speed doubled. If an Icy Rock is held by the Pokemon using Snowscape at the time of use, the duration of Snowscape will increase from 5 to 8 turns. The snowstorm allows Aurora Veil to be used. While Snowscape is in effect, Synthesis , Morning Sun , and Moonlight will recover only of the user's maximum HP. Additionally, the move Weather Ball becomes Ice-type.
